privacy.notes: Callback evidence is source, static package-inspection, and automated test evidence only.

rootCause.summary: The right-panel overview model filtered non-risk disclosure=moreInfo runtime structure facts out of the visible model and did not expose an expanded secondary-details renderer.
rootCause.fixedBoundary: Overview facts are grouped into default summary facts and expandable moreInfo facts; warning/fail facts are still promoted into the default summary.

validation.command: git diff --check -- touched implementation and test files

validation.note: The sandboxed first attempt failed on listen EPERM for 127.0.0.1; rerun with local listener permission passed.

ownerLocalStableApp.handoffRequirement: Release/Packaging or clean local-stable promotion must refresh the owner-used app to include fa0ca9f6ed5beb589b00dd1593d8379abb87476d or a descendant before QA owner-baseline regression.

qaRegressionRequest.expectedResult: The Preview right information surface exposes a 更多信息 disclosure for secondary runtime-structure diagnostics while keeping warning/fail fields visible by default.
adjacentChecks: Inspect packaged app.asar for overviewFactGroups and createOverviewMoreInfoDisclosure.
Open a low-risk file and confirm secondary runtime-structure diagnostics are accessible after expanding 更多信息.
Open or synthesize a high-risk runtime-structure file and confirm the triggering field appears in the default summary.
Confirm default UI uses friendly labels and does not expose SpriteEntity, FrameEntity, 图层数, or 图层过多 as runtime structure labels.
